purpose: Guide survey-relative paper triage while stating the evidence depth actually achieved.

questions.prompt: What exact work and version am I inspecting, and how does it fit the active survey question, boundary, and selected direction?
questions.answer_expectation: Establish identity and survey fit only from the material and survey context available.
questions.evidence_expectation: Cite source identity and current survey-context refs.

questions.prompt: What survey-relevant problem and principal claim can I establish at the inspection depth actually achieved?
questions.answer_expectation: State the achieved depth and avoid presenting abstract-only evidence as full-text examination.
questions.evidence_expectation: Cite the exact inspected abstract, summary, section, or other locator.

questions.prompt: Does this work add a new contribution, duplicate known work, complement a current category, or challenge an existing survey claim?
questions.answer_expectation: Offer a provisional portfolio relation or mark it unresolved pending deeper inspection.
questions.evidence_expectation: Cite current survey records and the visible work evidence used for comparison.

questions.prompt: What is the strongest visible evidence relevant to the survey, where is it located, and what evidence depth have I actually achieved?
questions.answer_expectation: Name the strongest inspected evidence and calibrate every claim to its depth.
questions.evidence_expectation: Cite the exact visible locator and record the achieved evidence depth.

questions.prompt: Which assumptions, evaluation settings, missing comparisons, contradictions, or identity and access uncertainties limit its relevance to this survey?
questions.answer_expectation: Record visible risks and leave uninspected risks unresolved.
questions.evidence_expectation: Cite exact risk evidence or the access and identity blocker.

questions.prompt: What survey disposition should I recommend: deep dive, defer, or exclude from the current boundary, what gap would it fill, and what must be verified first?
questions.answer_expectation: Recommend a bounded disposition with verification prerequisites and no automatic acceptance.
questions.evidence_expectation: Cite the inspected signals, survey gap, and any blocker behind the recommendation.

additional_question_collector.prompt: Did the user explicitly assign any additional questions to this Mindset Record that the fixed Mindset Source questions do not cover?
additional_question_collector.answer_expectation: Register only questions explicitly targeted to the Mindset Record. Save ordinary paper or source-code questions and findings in the applicable reading Artifacts. If no additional questions were explicitly assigned, record none.
additional_question_collector.evidence_expectation: Record the explicit association basis and cite evidence when the supplemental question is answered.
